HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Continued To Mar-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Brent Peterson for Judgment Creditor.
No other appearances.

Matter was called at 9:30am and re-called at 10:50am.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF GCFS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued March 16, 2021 at 9:30am for Mr. Peterson to contact Mr. Conlu directly to arrange on paymemt plan and ensure debtor has notice of hearing. Counsel for Judgment Creditor to give notice to Judgment Debtor.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
